posts.title: 数据结构anywiew第六章
posts.text: 题目序号DC06PE02123456789101112131415#include "allinclude.h"Status is_Desendant(SqBiTree T, int u, int v) { // Add your code here if(v>T.lastIndex || u>T.lastIndex || v<=u || u<1 || v<1) return FALSE;while (v>u) { if (v/2==u) { return TRUE; } v/=2;}return FALSE;}
